title: Codex visual review S06 panel a1

payload.failure_mode_positive_invariant: researcher solo (no duo): black rectangular glasses + dark short hair + black tee, seated by the window, chin in hand, gazing OUT, pen resting mid-doodle; warm golden lecture hall (density cal_S12) vs cool window daylight; phone FACE-UP on the desk small but razor-crisp (green dot ARIS · RUNNING, amber T-18:40 from ddl_widget_template_v1 font source); blackboard attention/denoising equations readable but secondary; margin doodle of TWO tiny blue/green hoodie stick figures; paper cup with NO steam (motif mug absent); classmates blurred pixel silhouettes.
payload.notes: Codex VISUAL second-model review completed (GPT-5.5 xhigh) independent read of S06_panel_a01.png, mode=baked, CLI -i path, RC=0。SOLO 研究者身份锁稳定：黑色方框眼镜、深色短发、黑 T 恤，坐窗边托腮望向窗外、笔尖停在涂鸦上，与 researcher_chibi_canonical_ref_v001/identity_refs 一致；duo 正确不在场，仅以页边蓝/绿 hoodie 双火柴人涂鸦间接在场（B05 人世喘息拍的关键留白），identity_consistency=5。像素风格整体统一：午前暖金阶梯教室密度对齐 cal_S12，阳光斜切课桌，窗外冷色天光与远处教学楼构成暖冷分区，无热气纸杯延续 fading-mug 母题，style_consistency=5。构图基本可读，但黑板上密集的可读公式区（Attention: softmax(QK^T / √d)V / Denoising Diffusion: x_T ~ N(0,I) → x_t -> x_{t-1}, epsilon_theta(x_t,t)）信息量大，首读时与课桌上小尺寸的面朝上手机锚短暂争夺视线，绿点 ARIS · RUNNING 之后才稳住焦点——手机是本拍唯一信息锚，应即时取胜，composition_readability=4（结构性扣分，非 beat 级）。本稿为 baked：思考气泡「它真能跑出……能写进论文的东西吗？」与手机锁屏字面（ARIS · RUNNING 绿点 / 琥珀 T-18:40，字体与 ddl_widget_template_v1 共源）清晰锐利、拼写正确，baked_text_quality=5；观察到的字面文本 observed_literals 含黑板全部公式 token 与手机/讲义字面，expected_literals（ARIS / RUNNING / T-18:40）全部命中，语义与 B05 课堂怀疑语境一致，content_corruption_present=false。面板内除 baked 文本外无零星模拟字形残留 stray_text_present=false；安全区被 baked 思考气泡与黑板区占据 safezone_present=false（baked 模式预期内）。阳光 dither 与同学虚化剪影边缘轻度噪点，artifact_severity=1（轻微，集中在背景光带，不构成 beat 级缺陷）。与 Gemini 在 identity 上零分歧（disagreeId=0）。整体 KEEP 倾向：solo 身份/语义/烤字全稳，无内容变形，仅构图首读层次一处次级扣分。
